scripts.validate: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.project.yaml
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- dev loj.project.yaml
scripts.validate:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- validate loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.build:generated:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.dev:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- dev loj.fastapi.project.yaml
scripts.validate:rules: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- rules validate backend/resources/policies/invoice-access.rules.loj
scripts.build:rules: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- rules build backend/resources/policies/invoice-access.rules.loj --out-dir generated/rules
scripts.proof: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- rules build backend/resources/policies/invoice-access.rules.loj --out-dir generated/rules && npm run exec --workspace=@loj-lang/cli -- build loj.project.yaml && node demo-pack.mjs && node publish-preview-assets.mjs
scripts.demo-pack:fastapi: npm run build --workspace=@loj-lang/cli && LOJ_PROJECT_FILE=loj.fastapi.project.yaml node demo-pack.mjs
